reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 어묵세트 너무귀엽고 만족합니다ㅎ시간가는줄모르고 짱재밌어하고 잘놀아요! 버섯에도 공간이있으면 좋겠지만 개봉하자마자 침범벅에 바스락장난감으로 되어있어서 더좋아해오! 유부장난감을 최고로좋아하는듯해요.완전만족입니다♡♡
reviews.content_en: The odeng set is so cute and I'm so satisfied! 😊 My pup loses track of time and has a blast playing with it! I wish there was space in the mushroom too, but right out of the box it has a crinkly toy effect which she loves even more! She seems to love the inari toy the best. Completely satisfied! ♡♡

reviews.name: 견****
reviews.content: 요즘 우리 을숙이 최애 장난감!!! 지난번에 떡말이랑 고로케도 사서 아직도 꼬질꼬질하지만 잘 가지구 있는데 어묵탕도 페이코 할인할때 겸사겸사 같이 사봤어요. 처음엔 관심 안주나 했더니 몇 번 간식 넣어주니까 이제 혼자서도 물고 뜯고 맛보고 맛나게 갖구 놀아용ㅎㅎㅎㅎ 냄비는 사실 귀여우라고 있는 것 같고 주댕이가 짧은 애라 꼬치어묵??이거로도 노즈워크 충분히 오래 합니다 삼진어묵 콜라보 또 기대합니다~~
reviews.content_en: These days it's our Eulseuk's favorite toy!!! We bought the tteokk-mari and croquette ones last time and she still has them (even though they're a bit worn), so we grabbed the odeng-tang too during the PAYCO discount sale. At first she wasn't interested, but after putting some treats in a few times, now she plays with it on her own, biting and tearing at it and savoring it ㅎㅎㅎㅎ The pot is honestly just there because it's cute, and since my pup is a short girl, the skewer odeng keeps her busy with nose work for a long time! I'm already looking forward to the next Samjin Odeng collaboration~ ~~

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
바잇미 바스락 장난감을 워낙 좋아해서 자주 구매하는데,
하나에 여러가지 장난감 들어있다고 해서 구매했어요!

두 친구 다 아직 아가들이라서 장난감 엄청 좋아하는데, 특히 저 쑥갓을 엄청 좋아해요!
바스락 거려서 좋아하나 했는데 씹고 뜯고 맛보다가 바스락 비닐이 빠졌는데도 매일 둘이서 물고 다녀요 ㅎㅎ

어묵탕 처럼 생긴것도 귀여운데 장난감 5가지라서 더 좋은것 같아요!
이제 곧 어묵도 망가질거 같아서, 재구매 할 생각있습니당 ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en:
I really love BITE ME's crinkly toys and buy them often, so when I saw this had multiple toys in one set, I had to get it!

Both my little ones are still puppies and they go crazy for toys, especially that garland (ssukgat)! I thought they liked it because of the crinkle sound, but even after the crinkly plastic came off, they still carry it around in their mouths every day ㅎㅎ

The thing that looks like odeng-tang is cute too, and since there are 5 different toys, it's even better! I think the odeng is about to break soon, so I'm planning to rebuy ㅎㅎ

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content:
장난감은 바잇미이에요
생일 선물겸 해서 사줬더니 
난리난리에요 혼자 잘 던지고 놀고
어묵탕 장난감 대만족입니다:)
reviews.content_en:
The toy is from BITE ME.
I got it as a birthday gift and my pup went absolutely crazy! He loves throwing it and playing with it on his own.
The odeng-tang toy is a total hit! :)

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 이 장난감은 쑥갓이 진짜..킬포에요ㅠㅠㅋㅋ너무 귀엽고 망충한데 초록초록하니 개인소장하고파요..ㅋㅋㅋㅋ 머리 쿡 박고 정신없이 어묵탕 먹는거 진짜 귀엽고ㅠㅠㅠ표고버섯도 던지기놀이에 잘 쓰고 있어요
reviews.content_en: This toy... the garland (ssukgat) is seriously the killer feature ㅠㅠㅋㅋ It's so cute and charming, and it's so green that I want to keep it for myself.. ㅋㅋㅋㅋ Seeing her bury her head in it and eat the odeng-tang so intently is seriously adorable ㅠㅠㅠ The shiitake mushroom is also great for throw-and-fetch games!

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content:
처음에 사진 보고 너무 귀엽고 재미있을 것 같아서 구매했는데, 실제로 받아보니까 생각보다 더 만족스러웠어요! 😊
노즈워크 장난감이 단순히 간식 숨겨놓는 정도일 줄 알았는데, 어묵탕 컨셉이라 그런지 디자인도 독특하고 강아지가 흥미를 오래 가지는 게 느껴지더라고요.

저희 강아지가 평소에 먹는 것에 진심이라 노즈워크 제품 여러 개 써봤는데, 이건 확실히 집중도가 다르네요. 간식 숨겨주면 코로 하나하나 찾으면서 엄청 열심히 탐색하는 모습이 너무 귀여워요ㅋㅋ 덕분에 집에서 혼자 있는 시간에도 지루하지 않게 잘 놀 수 있어서 만족스러워요.

재질도 생각보다 탄탄하고 마감도 깔끔해서 쉽게 망가지지 않을 것 같고, 세탁도 어렵지 않아서 위생적으로 관리하기 좋았어요. 무엇보다 강아지가 너무 좋아해서 꺼내기만 하면 바로 달려오는 모습 보면 사길 잘했다 싶어요.

추운 날씨에 ‘따끈한 어묵탕’ 컨셉이라 그런지 더 귀엽고 사진 찍기에도 좋아서 인스타용으로도 완전 추천이에요📸
노즈워크 입문용으로도 괜찮고, 기존에 다른 제품 써보신 분들도 충분히 만족하실 것 같아요.

강아지 집중력 키워주고 스트레스 해소에도 도움 되는 것 같아서 앞으로도 자주 사용할 예정이에요! 고민하시는 분들께 추천드립니다💛
reviews.content_en:
When I first saw the photos I thought it was so cute and looked fun, so I bought it, and when I actually received it, I was even more satisfied than I expected! 😊

I thought a nose work toy would just be a simple treat-hiding game, but because of the odeng-tang concept, the design is so unique and my dog maintains interest in it for a long time.

My pup is really serious about eating, so I've tried several nose work products, but this one definitely has a different level of focus. When I hide treats, she searches so hard, finding them one by one with her nose—it's incredibly cute ㅋㅋ Thanks to this, even when she's alone at home, she plays happily without getting bored.

The material is sturdier than expected and the finish is clean, so it doesn't seem like it'll break easily, and washing it isn't difficult either, so it's great for hygienic management. Most of all, my dog loves it so much that she comes running as soon as I take it out—I knew I made the right choice!

With the 'warm odeng-tang' concept on cold days, it's even cuter and great for taking photos, so I totally recommend it for Instagram! 📸
It's good as an introductory nose work toy, and I think people who've already tried other products will definitely be satisfied too.

Since it seems to help my dog with concentration and stress relief, I'm planning to use it often going forward! I recommend it to anyone who's thinking about it! 💛

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
진짜 너무 귀여워요
노즈워크도 할 수 있어서 실용성도 갑‼️
저희 코코 최애템로 등극했습니다,,🥹
진짜 재구매 의향 💯
디테일도 너무 좋고
장난감 하나하나 다 너무 귀여워요,,진심이에요
진짜 너무 너무 강추에요‼️💓💓
reviews.content_en:
It's seriously so cute!
And since you can do nose work with it, the practicality is amazing! ‼️
It's now our Coco's favorite item,, 🥹
Definitely will rebuy 💯
The details are so good too,
Each individual toy is so cute,, I'm serious!
I seriously highly recommend it! ‼️ 💓💓

reviews.name: 서****
reviews.content:
보자마자 너무 깜찍해서 안 살 수가 없다고 소리지른 장난감 삼진어묵...!!!
이 퀄리티 뭐냐구요ㅠㅠㅠㅠㅠ
그릇에서 하나씩 조심스럽게 골라가서 한참을 가지고 놀아요ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ
귀여워 죽겠어요♥️
어묵이나 쑥갓이나 재료 하나하나 표정 그려진 것도 너무 귀여워요🥹
reviews.content_en:
The moment I saw it I screamed I had to have the Samjin Odeng toy because it's so adorable...!!!
What's with this quality ㅠㅠㅠㅠㅠ
She carefully picks one piece at a time from the bowl and plays with it for ages ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ
It's so cute I could die ♥️
Each ingredient like the odeng and garland even has little faces drawn on them, it's so cute! 🥹

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content: 노즈워크 워낙 좋아해서 오뎅탕도 코박고 간식 먹느라 정신이 없네요 ㅋ 쫀쫀한 원단이라 물고 쭙쭙거려도 튼튼해 보여 좋습니다 아기자기하고 귀여워요 __수정합니다 지금보니 저는 쑥이 없네요ㅠ 빠트려서 온건지 제품은 오뎅버섯 뿐이었는데 # 2차 수정이요~! 바잇미 직원분들 진짜 너무 친절하셔요~^^ 쑥갓 누락으로 쑥갓만 따로 배송해주셨어요^^ 상담전화도 친절하시고 정말 감사드립니다~ 우리 견우 쑥갓 처음본다고 또 물고뜯고 난리났어요 ㅋㅋ 바잇미 짱~~~!
reviews.content_en: Since I love nose work so much, with the odeng-tang my pup has her nose buried in it and is so busy eating treats ㅋ The stretchy fabric is great—even with all the biting and pulling, it looks sturdy! It's detailed and cute! __Editing: Now that I look, I don't have the garland... I'm not sure if it got left out, but the product only had odeng and mushroom. # Second edit! The BITE ME staff are seriously so kind~^^ They separately shipped just the garland because it was missing^^ The customer service call was also kind, I'm really grateful~ Our Gyeongwoo saw the garland for the first time and went crazy biting and tearing at it ㅋㅋ BITE ME is the best~~~!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
이렇게 귀여운 장난감이 있다니요!!!
울애기가 엄청 좋아합니다.
어묵탕 넘 좋아요
reviews.content_en:
There's a toy this cute!!!!
My baby loves it so much.
The odeng-tang is amazing!

reviews.name: 바****
reviews.content: 노즈워크 하려고 간식이랑 세트로 샀어요.. 그 책시리즈처럼 오래 가지고 노는 용은 아니지만 나름 알차서 잘 갖고 놀아요 쑥갓은 너무 좋아해서 금방 찢었는데 솜이 없어서 그냥 그대로 가지고놀게 둡니다.. 제일 좋아하는 것 같아서요. 간식도 잘먹어요
reviews.content_en: I bought this as a set with treats for nose work games. It's not the type of toy you play with for a long time like that book series, but it's pretty solid and my pup plays with it well. My dog absolutely loves the mugwort toy and tore it up right away, but since there's no stuffing inside, I just let him play with it as is. He seems to love it the most. He also eats the treats well.

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content:
가격에 비해 구성이 너무 좋아요
디자인도 귀엽고 강아지가 환장합니다
reviews.content_en: The set composition is amazing for the price. The design is cute and my dog goes crazy for it!

reviews.name: 소****
reviews.content: 엄청 귀엽고 생각보다 작아요~ 강아지한테 한그릇 사이즈입니다 ㅎㅎ 쑥갓이 얄미운듯 재밌게 생겼네요 강아지도 좋아해요^^
reviews.content_en: It's so cute and smaller than I expected~ It's about one bowl-sized for my pup haha. The mugwort toy looks mischievously cute~ My dog loves it too^^

reviews.name: 은****
reviews.content: 노즈워크랑 삑삑이 등 여러 구성이 있어서 너무 좋아요~ 소형 강아지 친구들에게 딱인 사이즈에요:)
reviews.content_en: I love that there are so many components like nose work toys and squeakers~ It's the perfect size for small dog friends :)

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 너무 귀여워요 구성도 알차구 생각보다는 작아요~
reviews.content_en: It's super cute and the set composition is great even though it's smaller than expected~

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content: 넘 귀여워요 생각보다 작지만 알찬 구성이네여
reviews.content_en: It's adorable and while it's smaller than I thought, the set composition is really solid!

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 아주 좋아요 배송빠르고 상품 굿 재주문할거에요
reviews.content_en: Really great! Fast shipping and the product is good. I'll be ordering again!

reviews.name: 행****
reviews.content: 표고버섯 처돌이..ㅎㅎ 진짜 귀여워요 하루종일 물고 다녀요 ㅎㅎ 버섯만도 팔아주세요!! 통통하면서도 입에 물기 좋은 사이즈라 환장하는거같아요 ㅋㅋㅋ
reviews.content_en: The shiitake mushroom is such a cutie..hehe. It's seriously adorable and my pup carries it around all day hehe. Please sell just the mushroom!! The chubby yet easy-to-grip size has him absolutely obsessed with it kekeke

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content:
생각보다 엄청 작은 사이즈이에요.
제가 보기에는 귀여운데, 강아지는 간식 빼먹을 때 잠깐 말고는 관심 없고
다른 인형을 더 좋아하네요.
제가 보기에 귀여우니까 괜찮습니다 ㅎㅎ
바잇미 장난감은 이런 컨셉이 있는것들이 참 귀엽고, 관심이 가게되네요.
reviews.content_en: It's much smaller than I expected. In my opinion it's cute, but my dog only shows interest when there are treats inside, and he prefers other toys. But since I think it's cute, that's fine hehe. BITE ME toys with this kind of concept are really adorable and catching my attention.

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content:
저는 쑥갓이 젤 맘에 들어요...😋 보고만 있어도 어묵탕 먹고싶어지는 비줠이네용
간식 넣어줄때만 가지구놀지만 맘에 듭니당
reviews.content_en: I love the mugwort toy the most...😋 Just looking at it makes me crave fishcake soup lol. He only plays with it when I put treats in, but I still love it ♡

reviews.name: 유****
reviews.content: 하나 써보니 너무 귀여워서 강아지모임 선물로 여러개 추가 구매했어요~ 캠핑 필수템입니다 ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: I tried one and it was so cute that I ended up buying several more as gifts for our dog meetup group! 🐕 It's a must-have for camping ㅎㅎ

reviews.name: 소****
reviews.content: 노즈워크 고수라서 쉽지만 디자인이 귀여워요
reviews.content_en: My dog is a nosework expert so it's pretty easy, but the design is adorable

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 강아지가 너무 좋아해요! 디피용으로 해도될만큼 예쁘고 아기자기해요!
reviews.content_en: My dog absolutely loves it! 😍 It's so pretty and charming that it even works as a display piece!

reviews.name: 배****
reviews.content: 오목조목 너무 귀여운 장난감이에요 노즈워크좋아해서 납작어묵에 쏙~
reviews.content_en: Such a cute little toy with all its details! Since my dog loves nosework, he goes right for it ~

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 귀엽게 생기고 내구성이 좋아요

reviews.name: 배****
reviews.content: 귀엽고 잘 가지고 놀아요~~!

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content: 귀여워요 배송도빠름!
reviews.content_en: It's adorable and shipping was fast!

reviews.name: 한****
reviews.content: 구성이 넘넘 알찬 것 같아요. 빠스락 노즈워크 삑삑이.. 친구네 강아지 줄거라 취향을 몰라서 세트로 구매했어요. 그냥 귀여워서 친구도좋아할듯..^^
reviews.content_en: The set seems really well put together. It has crinkly sounds, nosework features, squeakers... I got the set because I'm giving it to a friend's dog and didn't know their preferences. It's just so cute that my friend will love it too ^^

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 배송빠르고 좋아요 최고에요
reviews.content_en: Fast shipping and great! It's the best

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 진짜 너무 귀여워요..
reviews.content_en: It's seriously so cute..

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
생각보다 작고 노즈워크 할만한 장난감도 2개뿐이라 노즈워크 좀 해본 강아지들은 흥미가 금방 떨어질거 같습니다
장난감 자체는 너무 귀엽고 디테일들이 많이 있어서 만족스럽습니다!
reviews.content_en: It's smaller than I expected and there are only 2 nose work toys, so dogs that have done nose work before will probably lose interest quickly. That said, the toy itself is super cute and has lots of nice details, so I'm satisfied!

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content:
너무 귀여워요
노즈워크하는데는 좀 부족하긴한데 귀여워서 구매했습니다.
reviews.content_en: It's so adorable! 😊 It's a bit lacking for nose work, but I bought it because it's just too cute.

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 디자인도 너무 귀엽고 다양한 형태의 노즈워크가 있어서 좋아요!
reviews.content_en: The design is so cute and I love that it has various types of nose work activities!

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 삼진어묵과 콜라보라 구매했는데 너무 귀엽고 만족스러워요~
reviews.content_en: I bought it because of the SAMJIN EOMUK collaboration and it's so cute and satisfying~

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 생각보다 엄청 작은데 너무 귀엽고 퀄리티 좋아요. 애기가 좋아할 것 같아요!
reviews.content_en: It's way smaller than I thought but it's so cute and great quality. I think my pup is going to love it!

reviews.name: 안****
reviews.content:
회사 직원분 강아지에게 선물로 주고파서 샀어요. 노즈워크 바스락 등 다양하게 들어있는 것 같아서 샀는데 막상 받아보니 많이 작네요
작은 강아지에게 주는거라 오히려 좋습니다.
reviews.content_en: I bought it as a gift for my coworker's dog. I got it thinking it would have various features like nose work and crinkly sounds, but it turned out to be pretty small. Since it's for a small dog, it actually works out better!

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 선물하려구샀오요 넘 기여워요!!!생각보단 사이즈는 좀 작은편입니다
reviews.content_en: I bought it as a gift and it's SO CUTE!!! The size is a bit smaller than expected though.

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 생각보다 작아서 놀랬지만 강아지가 정말 좋아합니당
reviews.content_en: I was surprised at how small it is, but my dog absolutely loves it! 😍

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
전 바잇미장난감 꽤 좋아하는데..
이번 장난감은 개인적으론 살짝 실망요~;;
표고버섯은 삑삑이공이 비뚤게 들어간건지, 소리내서 누르려면 아주 신경써서 눌러야되고(처음엔 바람빠지는 소리만나서 불량인줄..),  어묵 모양은 주름잡는 끈에 달린 조이는 부속품이 너무 약해서 금방 망가질것 같고, 주머니안에 인형4개중에 2개만 노즈워크 가능..;;
그나마도 노즈워크인형은 그냥 거의 오픈상태라 간식넣어주면 1초컷^^;:::
좀더 살펴보고, 1개라도 재밌게 놀수있는걸로 사줄걸 싶어요..
나이9살 푸들은 눈치백단이라 성에 안차는듯요ㅋ
다견가정이거나, 그냥 바스락인형도 좋아하는 아이들은 괜찮을것 같네요
reviews.content_en: I usually really like BITE ME toys, but I'm a bit disappointed with this one... The shiitake mushroom has a squeaker that either went in crooked, or I have to be super careful pressing it to make it squeak (at first I thought it was defective because I only heard an air-deflating sound 😅), and the fish cake design has a cinch attachment on the handle that feels too flimsy and will probably break soon. Out of the 4 toys in the pouch, only 2 are actually nose work toys... And even those are basically wide open, so treats fall out in like 1 second 😂 I wish I'd looked more carefully and picked something my pup could actually enjoy playing with. My 9-year-old Poodle is pretty picky and doesn't seem impressed by this one 😅 I think it would be okay for multi-dog households or dogs that just like crinkly toys though!

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content:
아가가 택배 뜯자마자 가져가더라고요 
자기꺼인줄 아나봐요 
엄청 좋아해요
reviews.content_en: My baby grabbed it the second the package arrived! 🐶 I guess she knew it was hers! She absolutely loves it!

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 울 강쥐가 젤 좋아하는건.. 노즈워크 간식이 들어가는 유부주머니 ㅋㅋ
reviews.content_en: Our Gangju's favorite thing is... the treat pouch for nose work games lol

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 귀여워요 강아지도 좋나하는데 5살 딸이 주방 놀이를 읻걸오 하네요 ㅋㅋ 하나 더 사줘야될듯 깊네여
reviews.content_en: It's so cute and my dog seems to like it too, but my 5-year-old daughter keeps wanting to use it for kitchen play lol 😂 I think I need to buy another one. It's getting a lot of use!

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 30분을 킁킁거리고 잘놉니다 가성비 굳이에여
reviews.content_en: She sniffs around for 30 minutes and then takes a nap. Great value for the price 👍

reviews.name: 백****
reviews.content: 생각보다 작고 오밀조밀 귀여워요
reviews.content_en: It's smaller than expected and so adorably compact!

reviews.name: 서****
reviews.content: 작은 만큼 더 귀여워요~
reviews.content_en: The smaller size just makes it even cuter~ 🐕

reviews.name: ㄱ****
reviews.content:
삑삑이공잇는부분도 노즈워크할수잇는 부분이잇엇음좋겟어요
강아지가잘가꾸놀아요
reviews.content_en: It would be even better if the squeaky part also had a nose work section. My dog really enjoys playing with it though!

reviews.name: 염****
reviews.content: 장난감은 역시 바잇미 >_< 삼둥이는 바잇미 덕분에 행복!!
reviews.content_en: Toys are definitely BITE ME >_< Our triplets are so happy thanks to BITE ME!!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
이 어묵이 몬데.. 환장하심
맨날 종류별로 물고다니심👍🏻
reviews.content_en: This fish cake toy is... driving them crazy 😍 They carry it around by type all day long 👍🏻

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 종종 쓰고 있어요 노즈워크로 좋네요
reviews.content_en: I use it regularly. It's great for nose work games!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 강아지 칭구 생일 선물로 사서 뜯어보진 못했는데 노즈워크를 좋아하는 친구라 얼마나 좋아할 지 기대돼요 ♥️
reviews.content_en: I bought it as a birthday gift for my dog's friend and haven't opened it yet, but since they love nose work games, I'm so excited to see how much they'll like it! ♥️
